codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly creates server/constants.ts with all five required constants and updates the routes and config to import and use them. All magic numbers have been properly replaced with named constants. The constants file includes helpful JSDoc comments for documentation.

VAL-CONST-015.evidence: server/routes/claims.ts imports RESERVATION_MINUTES (line 14) and uses it in SQL query (line 165)

VAL-CONST-016.evidence: server/routes/claims.ts imports MAX_CLAIMS_QUERY (line 14) and uses it in LIMIT clause (line 41)

VAL-CONST-017.evidence: server/routes/listings.ts imports DEFAULT_EXPIRY_MINUTES (line 13) and uses it as default (line 81)

VAL-CONST-018.evidence: server/routes/listings.ts imports MAX_LISTINGS_QUERY (line 13) and uses it in LIMIT clause (line 48)

VAL-CONST-019.evidence: server/config.ts imports DEFAULT_PORT (line 1) and uses it in normalizePort (lines 31, 34)

summary: Feature implementation passes review. All 11 validation contract assertions are satisfied. The constants file was created with correct values and all magic numbers in claims.ts, listings.ts, and config.ts have been replaced with the named constants. The worker followed the skill procedure correctly, ran all verification steps, and all tests pass. The architecture.md and AGENTS.md already document the constants location, so no shared state gaps were identified.
